description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume from Rasasi is for the self assured women. Product Details Rasasi Confidence is a spray perfume for women which comes in a fancy glass flask with a stylish cap Size 75 ml
